items.question: Is Sparklink really free?
items.answer: Yes! Sparklink offers a free tier with limited features. You can earn more free time by watching videos or inviting friends.

items.question: Does Sparklink keep logs?
items.answer: No, we have a strict no-logs policy. We never track or store your browsing activity.

items.question: How does the free trial work?
items.answer: Simply download the app and start using it. Free users get limited access to servers with ad-supported viewing.

items.question: Can I use Sparklink on multiple devices?
items.answer: Yes! Free users can connect 1 device simultaneously. Paid plans support up to 10 or unlimited devices depending on your subscription tier.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept major credit cards, debit cards, and popular digital payment methods including PayPal and cryptocurrencies. Payment is processed securely through our payment partners.

items.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
items.answer: You can cancel anytime from your account settings. Your subscription will remain active until the end of the current billing period. There are no cancellation fees.

items.question: Which countries have servers?
items.answer: Sparklink operates servers in 30+ countries across North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, and South America. Paid users get access to all locations.

items.question: What is the refund policy?
items.answer: We offer a 7-day money-back guarantee for first-time purchases. If you're not satisfied within the first 7 days, contact our support team for a full refund.

items.question: How do I contact support?
items.answer: Free users can reach us through our community forum. Paid subscribers get priority 24/7 support via email and live chat for faster response times.

items.question: What protocols does Sparklink support?
items.answer: Sparklink supports multiple protocols including WireGuard, V2Ray, and OpenVPN. The app automatically selects the optimal protocol based on your network conditions.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
Last updated: May 2025

1. Information We Collect
We collect information you provide directly, such as your phone number when you register. We also collect usage data including connection timestamps, data volume, and server selections to improve our service.

2. How We Use Your Information
We use your information to provide, maintain, and improve our VPN service; to send you technical notices and support messages; and to comply with legal obligations.

3. Data Security
We implement industry-standard encryption and security measures to protect your data. We do not log or store your browsing activity, DNS queries, or connection content.

4. Data Sharing
We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with service providers who assist us in operating our infrastructure, under strict confidentiality agreements.

5. Your Rights
You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data by contacting our support team.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content:
Last updated: May 2025

1. Acceptance of Terms
By using Sparklink, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

2. Service Description
Sparklink provides a virtual private network service that encrypts your internet connection and routes it through our servers.

3. Acceptable Use
You agree not to use Sparklink for any illegal activities, including but not limited to: hacking, fraud, or distributing malicious software.

4. Free Tier
Free users may access limited servers with restrictions. Additional free time can be earned through watching advertisements or inviting friends.

5. Payments and Refunds
Paid subscriptions are billed according to your chosen plan. We offer a 7-day money-back guarantee on first-time purchases.

6. Termination
We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or engage in prohibited activities.

7. Limitation of Liability
Sparklink is provided "as is" without warranty. We are not liable for damages arising from use of our service.
